children.name: p
children.textContent: Your personal energy map — last 7 days

children.name: p
children.textContent: On 7 of the last 10 days, your energy dropped 35% between 2–4 PM after a carb-heavy lunch.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Your deep sleep score increases 18% when you eat dinner before 7 PM after a workout.

children.name: p
children.textContent: On days you eat within 30 min of your run, your next-day readiness score is 22pts higher.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Your best energy days come after 7+ hrs sleep + a walk before noon. 4 patterns identified.
